subcodes.first_line: O Helper! Thy mention hath flowed from the Most Exalted Pen, and the Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken thy name. Be thou thankful and say: Praise be unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یاور قد جری ذکرک من القلم الاعلی و نطق لسان العظمه باسمک اشکر و قل لک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
